chapter_outlines.title: The Veil Unfurls
chapter_outlines.chapter_goal: Demonstrate the Veil’s seductive power and existential cost by having Elisa test a stroke, losing a pivotal memory while the chorus rises, compelling her to confront the choice between narrative control and oblivion.
